hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams aggregate wallet and transaction risk signals to screen crypto payments, link exposures to cases, and maintain audit-ready evidence across providers.

problem_title: Crypto payments risk remains hard to assess
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to link fragmented wallet and transaction data with sanctions and risk signals. This slows manual reviews and weakens audit evidence needed for defensible transaction screening and case management.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects wallet activity, sanctions data, risk signals and transaction details into unified cases and workflows so compliance teams can efficiently review crypto payments with complete audit evidence.
workflow_title: From wallet risk signals to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risk alerts to trigger structured reviews that create cases, preserve evidence and support compliance decisions for crypto payments.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented alerts. Connected risk evidence
why_sfty_description: SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risk signals into structured cases, linking alerts to customers, counterparties, and audit-ready evidence for clearer compliance decisions.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with controlled orchestration and audit-ready evidence to support clear compliance workflows and bank due diligence in enterprise environments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support crypto payment transaction screening
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how transaction risk links to case management workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports wallet and transaction reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Explain how provider orchestration manages sanctions and risk signals
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for crypto payment screening?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance layer that connects wallet screening, transaction monitoring, sanctions exposure and case workflows for crypto payment transactions within VASP operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle transaction risk workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates wallet risk and transaction alerts, applies policies, creates structured cases and supports human review of payment transactions with linked evidence and decision logs.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY captures detailed decision logs, links case evidence to wallet and transaction data, and stores audit trails to support review readiness and regulatory inspection support.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect existing transaction providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY is provider-neutral and integrates outputs from existing wallet screening, blockchain analytics and transaction monitoring tools into one connected compliance workflow.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace screening and KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but builds a control layer above screening and KYT tools, turning their outputs into integrated compliance operations and reports.
final_title: Connect crypto payment risk into structured cases
final_description: See how SFTY links wallet and transaction screening outputs into reviewable cases with audit-ready evidence and compliance workflow support.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
